---
format:
  html:
    css: styles/custom.css
listing:
  - id: latest-updates
    contents: blog/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    fields: [title, description, date]
    max-items: 6
profile: english
---

# FADS Open Science Hub 🐟💾

Welcome to the Fishery & Assessment Data Section (FADS) Open Science Documentation Hub! This is the public facing portion of our internal [FADS Wiki](https://086gc.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/FisheryAssessmentDataSectionWiki/SitePages/CollabHome.aspx?csf=1&web=1&e=tkJJk4) on SharePoint.

Here, we work in the open and share our knowledge to **enable open data science collaboration with a broad community**.

### Getting started

::: {.dsu-home-hero}
**What can this hub help you with?**

Start here if you’re preparing data for an FSAR, standardizing a dataset, looking up standard salmon terms, or getting ready to publish.

```{=html}
<div class="dsu-home-hero-actions">
  <a class="btn btn-success" href="how_to_guides/fsar-data-standardization-workflow.qmd">FSAR data quick-start</a>
  <a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="salmon-data-standards.qmd">Salmon Data Standards overview</a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="dsu-task-cards" aria-label="Common tasks">
  <a class="dsu-task-card" href="how_to_guides/fsar-data-standardization-workflow.qmd">
    <div class="dsu-task-card-title">Prepare data for an FSAR</div>
  <p class="dsu-task-card-desc">A step-by-step workflow, decision tree, and checklist for common FSAR data tasks.</p>
  </a>

  <a class="dsu-task-card" href="reference_info/data_standards/controlled-vocabulary-thesauri.qmd">
    <div class="dsu-task-card-title">Understand salmon terminology</div>
  <p class="dsu-task-card-desc">Search and browse controlled vocabulary terms, definitions, sources, and URIs.</p>
  </a>

  <a class="dsu-task-card" href="standardize-data.qmd">
    <div class="dsu-task-card-title">Standardize my data</div>
  <p class="dsu-task-card-desc">Map columns and codes to standard terms and document them clearly.</p>
  </a>

  <a class="dsu-task-card" href="integrate-data.qmd">
    <div class="dsu-task-card-title">Integrate datasets</div>
  <p class="dsu-task-card-desc">Align keys, codes, and assumptions so datasets can be merged safely.</p>
  </a>

  <a class="dsu-task-card" href="publish-data.qmd">
    <div class="dsu-task-card-title">Publish data externally</div>
  <p class="dsu-task-card-desc">Prepare your data package and metadata for sharing and reuse.</p>
  </a>
</div>
```
:::

### Search the hub 🔍

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">
  <button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" onclick="if (window.quartoOpenSearch) { window.quartoOpenSearch(); } else { const el = document.querySelector('.quarto-search-button'); if (el) el.click(); }">
    Search all articles
  </button>
  <span style="color: #444;">or press <strong>Ctrl/Cmd + K</strong> to open search.</span>
</div>
```

### Latest updates 📝

<div class="dsu-home-updates">
::: {#latest-updates}
:::
</div>

[See all updates](blog/index.qmd)

### Latest articles 📰

The newest additions from our guides, reference info, tutorials, and deep dives:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)

dirs <- c("how_to_guides", "reference_info", "tutorials", "deep_dives")

read_meta <- function(path) {
  lines <- readLines(path, warn = FALSE)
  if (length(lines) < 2 || lines[1] != "---") return(list())
  end <- which(lines[-1] == "---")
  if (!length(end)) return(list())
  # adjust because we searched lines[-1]
  end_idx <- end[1] + 1
  yaml_text <- paste(lines[2:end_idx], collapse = "\n")
  tryCatch(yaml::yaml.load(yaml_text), error = function(...) list())
}

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || is.na(a)) b else a

collect_entries <- function() {
  files <- unlist(lapply(dirs, function(d) {
    list.files(d, pattern = "\\.qmd$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
  }))
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(path = character(), title = character(), date = as.Date(character())))
  }
  entries <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    meta <- read_meta(f)
    title <- meta$title %||% tools::toTitleCase(gsub("-", " ", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f))))
    date_val <- meta$date
    if (is.null(date_val) || length(date_val) == 0) date_val <- NA
    date_parsed <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(date_val))
    if (length(date_parsed) == 0 || is.na(date_parsed)) date_parsed <- as.Date(file.info(f)$mtime)
    list(path = f, title = title, date = date_parsed)
  })
  do.call(rbind, lapply(entries, as.data.frame))
}

df <- collect_entries()
if (!nrow(df)) {
  cat("- No articles found yet.\n")
  knitr::knit_exit()
}
df <- df[order(df$date, decreasing = TRUE), ]
df <- head(df, 5)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  rel <- gsub("\\.qmd$", ".html", df$path[i])
  cat(sprintf("- [%s](%s) — %s\n", df$title[i], rel, format(as.Date(df$date[i]), "%Y-%m-%d")))
}
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Browse by category 📂

- How-to Guides 🛠 — quick task-focused steps (e.g., access requests, cleanup tips).
- Reference Info 📘 — definitions, standards, and tooling details (e.g., vocabularies, hosting, recommended R packages).
- Tutorials 🎓 — structured lessons to learn by doing (e.g., Power BI walkthroughs, Synapse notebooks).
- Deep dives 🧠 — context and rationale (e.g., metadata quality, data lifecycle, access protocols).

-----------------------------------------------------------------------


↩️ [Return to the Internal FADS SharePoint Wiki](https://086gc.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/FisheryAssessmentDataSectionWiki/SitePages/CollabHome.aspx?csf=1&web=1&e=tkJJk4)
